rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and issues with the section but does not walk through a complete argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly marks uncertainty for several claims and provides detailed explanations of why certain parts are uncertain or unsupported.
rationale.RX.3: Comprehensively covers all aspects of the section, identifying both major and minor issues without drifting from the scope.
rationale.RX.4: Highlights potential downstream harms such as misleading claims and ungrounded assertions but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides detailed explanations for each issue identified but could benefit from more explicit source attribution.
